title: Silver Ores and Crafts
description: Add silver ores in the minecraft world and their craftings
body:
# Silver Ores and Crafts

Add silver ores in the minecraft world and their craftings

## This mod adds:
- Items (Silver Ingot, Raw Silver, Silver Nugget)
- Tools (Silver Sword, Silver Pickaxe, Silver Axe, Silver Shovel, Silver Hoe)
- Blocks (Raw Silver Block, Silver Block, Silver ore Block)
- Armor (Silver Helmet, Silver Chestplate, Silver Leggings, Silver Boots)

## Compatible with Other Mods (Compatible Tags)

### Languages:
- English (en_us)
- Spanish (es_us, es_es, es_mx, es_ec, es_ve, es_uy)
- Portuguese (pt_br, pt_pt)
- Chinese (zh_cn)
- Russian (ru_ru)

Translated by AI
